case_title: LANE STEPHENS VS. OLGA ZHUKOVSKAYA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,906.93 FILED BY STEPHENS, LANE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHUKOVSKAYA, OLGA BELOSHAPKIN, GREGORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENS, LANE
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-28-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-05-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BELOSHAPKIN, GREGORY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZHUKOVSKAYA, OLGA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEPHENS, LANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHUKOVSKAYA, OLGA BELOSHAPKIN, GREGORY $3,906.93 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,026.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZHUKOVSKAYA, OLGA BELOSHAPKIN, GREGORY
